bride.name: Ananya
bride.bio: A beautiful soul, traditional yet modern, Ananya brings joy and light to everyone around her. She loves classical art, painting, and is the beloved daughter of the Sharma family.

groom.name: Aarav
groom.bio: A visionary tech leader with a warm heart, Aarav is known for his humility and wisdom. He enjoys photography, travelling, and is the proud son of the Singhal family.

heroSettings.shloka:
॥ श्री गणेशाय नमः ॥
वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटि समप्रभ
निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव
सर्वकार्येषु सर्वदा ॥
heroSettings.introText: With the blessings of Shri Ganesh and our beloved families, we joyfully invite you to celebrate the union of

engagementDetails.venueName: The Sapphire Crystal Hall, Taj Palace Hotel

familyDetails.message: With the divine blessings of Lord Ganesha and our ancestors, we cordially invite you and your family to grace our Engagement Ceremony.

welcomeMessage.title: Two Hearts, One Journey
welcomeMessage.subtitle: We invite you to celebrate our love
welcomeMessage.text: Because you have played a very special role in our lives, we would love for you to join us as we embark on this beautiful adventure together. Together with our families, we invite you to share our joy and laughter at our Engagement Ceremony.

timeline.title: How We Met
timeline.description: It started with a simple 'Hello' at a common friend's birthday party. We bonded over our shared love for street food and old Bollywood classics.

timeline.title: Our First Date
timeline.description: A magical evening by the Marine Drive. Hours felt like minutes as we talked about our dreams, ambitions, and families.

timeline.title: The Proposal
timeline.description: Under a canopy of stars in Udaipur, Aarav got down on one knee. It was a resounding 'YES!' followed by tears of joy.
